title: Chloe Petts: Big Naturals
full_description: Following three sell-out shows, Petts returns with a show about sex — she blushes every time she says that word. Growing up at the height of lad culture, eight-year-old Chloe Petts was entranced by Page Three. The show is named for what she loves most. She describes herself as 'between a lad and a lesbian' — it's a show about leaving the lad behind and finding the man.
ai_summary: Petts's fourth Fringe hour explores the version of masculinity she absorbed in the era of Page 3 and Loaded magazine, and what it takes to leave that behind — ending with a beautiful, quietly radical conclusion about who she actually wants to be.
